      public KSState initialState()
      Description copied from interface: Problem
      Returns the initial state of the problem.
      Specified by:
      initialState in interface Problem<KSState>
      Returns:
      the state representing the starting point of the optimization

      public double initialValue()
      Description copied from interface: Problem
      Returns the initial objective value associated with the initial state.
      Specified by:
      initialValue in interface Problem<KSState>
      Returns:
      the starting value of the objective function

    • isTarget

      public boolean isTarget(KSState state)
      Description copied from interface: Problem
      Checks whether the given state is a target (sink) state.
      Specified by:
      isTarget in interface Problem<KSState>
      Parameters:
      state - the current state
      Returns:
      true if the state is a target state, false otherwise

    • domain

      public Iterator<Integer> domain(KSState state)
      Description copied from interface: Problem
      Returns the domain of possible labels/actions from a given state.
      Specified by:
      domain in interface Problem<KSState>
      Parameters:
      state - the current state
      Returns:
      an iterator over all feasible labels for the given state

    • transition

      public KSState transition(KSState state, int label)
      Description copied from interface: Problem
      Applies a label/action to a state, computing the next state according to the problem's transition function.
      Specified by:
      transition in interface Problem<KSState>
      Parameters:
      state - the state from which the transition originates
      label - the label to apply
      Returns:
      the resulting state after applying the label

    • transitionCost

      public double transitionCost(KSState state, int label)
      Description copied from interface: Problem
      Computes the change in objective value resulting from applying a label to a given state.
      Specified by:
      transitionCost in interface Problem<KSState>
      Parameters:
      state - the state from which the transition originates
      label - the label to apply
      Returns:
      the incremental objective cost/value associated with this label

    • evaluate

      public double evaluate(int[] solution) throws InvalidSolutionException
      Description copied from interface: Problem
      Given a solution (a sequence of applied labels), returns its value and checks if the solution respects the problem's constraints.
      Specified by:
      evaluate in interface Problem<KSState>
      Parameters:
      solution - A solution of the problem (sequence of labels).
      Returns:
      The value of the input solution
      Throws:
      InvalidSolutionException - If the solution does not respect problem's constraints.

      Throws:
